raw_consumer_statement: On XXXX XXXX, I booked the round-trip tickets from XXXX to XXXX on XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX with the booking reference XXXX, and there were 2 flight changes before departure for these two tickets. Hence, I called XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX customer service and they told me it was free of charge to refund the tickets but I had to submit a refund form on their website as these tickets were issued by their office in XXXX. After I submitted the from for the reason Involuntary Flight Change, XXXX XXXX never reached me at all, but after a week, they took it upon themselves to modify the refund reason to voluntary cancellation in order to charge me with XXXXXXXX XXXX ( in XXXX currency ) cancellation in total. Hence I submitted two seperate disputes at american express 's site and XXXX XXXX  each. I also sumbit the proof to American Express, which clearly shows that XXXX XXXX was lying about the ticket refund reason. However, American Express just IGNORED all the proof I submitted after XXXX XXXX just showed them my ticket was canceled without any explanation. As a result of which, american express rebilled XXXX XXXX  ( XXXX XXXX  twice ) cancellation fee to my account.
